title: Skybounds
description: Start adventuring in our new biomes and mine our new ores so you can conquer the sky
body:
Skybounds expands your Minecraft world with new realms, ores, and cosmic power!
Venture through enchanted lands and desolate wastelands, master the elements of day and night, and forge weapons infused with sky energy.

✨ Features:

🌿 New Biomes

Celestial Valley – A vibrant, enchanted paradise filled with glowing colors and its own unique wood type.

Ashen Dunes – A barren desert of ashes, silent and lifeless… where no creature dares to dwell.

⛏️ New Ores & Materials

Aetherium – A rare pink mineral, stronger than diamond, used to craft superior tools and armor.

Pyronite – A volatile ore used in explosive crafting recipes. Handle with care!

Solarium – Harness the power of the sun to create radiant armor and weapons.

Nocturnium – Channel the energy of the night for shadow-forged gear.

☀️🌑 Eclipse Equipment
Combine Solarium and Nocturnium to forge Eclipse gear, powerful items infused with both day and night energy.

⚡ Sky Energy
Tap into the Energy of the Sky, a mysterious force used in advanced crafting recipes.
